hero.line3: the speed with the same packages.

install.body: Keep the packages you already rely on, and when you're ready to move over from Homebrew, run zb migrate to bring them across.

summaryCards.title: Why zerobrew
summaryCards.body: zerobrew keeps the Homebrew workflow familiar, but makes installs faster and the overall setup simpler to reason about.

summaryCards.title: Get started
summaryCards.body: Join the community if you want help getting set up, migrating over, or figuring out the right zerobrew workflow for your setup.
